subcodes.first_line: Verily, the Divine Tree desireth to bestow upon thee a fruit from among its fruits, a leaf from among its leaves, and a remembrance from its remembrances [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان السدره ارادت ان ترسل الیک ثمره من اثمارها و ورقه من اوراقها و ذکرا من
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @praise and encouragement
